name: defense-decision-record-audit-stream
description: DefenseTech audit-stream Operator: per-defense-AI-decision events hash-chained for DFARS 252.204-7012 + CMMC 2.0 L2/L3 + NIST SP 800-171/172 + ITAR + EAR + DoDI 5230.24 + NISPOM + FAR 52.204-21 + False Claims Act evidence. Every event carries explicit cui_categorization + export_control_status + foreign_person_access_restriction — DefenseTech's first 3-axis design innovation.

scripts.test: npm run build:examples && npm run verify
